fava-bean-cream-with-lentils-teleculinar.name: Fava Bean Cream With Lentils
instructions: In a pot, add the beans and cover with water. Season with salt and let it cook for 5 minutes. Remove, drain, pass cold water and remove the skin. Book the water and 50 g of beans.
In another pot, add the lentils, previously washed, cover with water, season with salt and cook for 12 minutes. Take it back and run.

In a large pan, add the cooking water of the beans and add the onion and garlic, previously peeled and roughly cut, the beans and 150 g of cooked lentils and let cook for 10 minutes. Remove from the fire, reduce the puree with a magic wand and add more water if desired.
Tempere com sal e pimenta e envolva. Divida a sopa por pratos e sirva decorada com as lentilhas e as favas reservadas, um fio de azeite e trevos.

fermented-hot-sauce.name: Fermented Hot Sauce

ingredients.item: A 1-pint glass jar; a layer of cheesecloth
Achiote seeds can be found in specialty stores
ingredients.prep: in the spice section of some supermarkets, and online.

instructions: Pulse garlic in a food processor until finely chopped. Add chiles, salt, and sugar and pulse until chile pieces are no bigger than ½". Transfer mixture to jar and press down so chiles are slightly submerged in their own liquid. Cover with cheesecloth and fasten with kitchen twine or a rubber band. Let sit in a cool place away from direct sunlight at least 2 days and up to 5 days. The liquid will develop a slightly sour smell and there should be small bubbles scattered throughout. The longer you let it ferment, the more active it will become, but don’t go longer than 5 days.

Heat oil, achiote seeds, and paprika in a small saucepan over medium-high. As soon as small bubbles appear around the edges of the pan (2–3 minutes), let cook another 30 seconds; let cool. Strain oil through a fine-mesh sieve into a heatproof bowl; discard solids.
Blend achiote oil, vinegar, and two-thirds of chile mixture in a blender until smooth. Transfer to an airtight container and stir in remaining chile mixture.
Do Ahead: Hot sauce can be made 2 weeks ahead; cover and chill.

fish-filet-in-thai-coconut-curry-sauce.name: Fish Filet In Thai Coconut Curry Sauce

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a skillet over medium heat and cook shallots until soft and translucent, about 2 minutes. Stir in curry paste, coconut milk, chicken broth, and sugar. Bring to a simmer, reduce heat to low and cook until curry has reduced by half, about 10 minutes. Season with salt if necessary.

Season fish with salt and carefully place in the skillet with the curry sauce, spooning some curry sauce on top. Cover skillet and cook until fish flakes easily from fork and is cooked through, about 5 minutes. Remove fish from skillet.
Stir cilantro, green onions, and lime juice into curry sauce and serve with the fish. Serve with lime wedges.

fish-soup-with-leek-teleculinaria.name: Fish Soup With Leek
instructions: Bring to the fire a pot with abundant water and salt. Add the hake tail and let it cook. Remove and drain in a strainer, reserved water. Let the fish cool down a bit, remove the skin and the spines and challenge.

Peel the onions and garlic and pick them. Skin the tomato, removes its seeds and cut it into cubes. Wash the leaves and cut it in slices. Peel the cart and cut it into slices as well. Peel the potatoes and cut them into pieces.
Light a pot with olive oil, garlic, onion and laurel and let it shine. Add the tomato, cart, potatoes, and water to cook the fish.

When the potatoes are cooked, remove them with a shell and crush them. Get back in the soup, add the fish and stir. Season with salt, correct the seasonings and remove from the fire. Eliminate the laurel, sprinkle with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.

flambe-shrimp-teleculinaria.name: Flambé Shrimp
instructions: Peel the shrimps and book. Peel and cut the garlic in circles.
Light a pan with half the butter and garlic and let it warm well.
Add the peeled shrimps, season with salt and spice and let saute well, stirring.
Then add the whiskey, light a match and let the flame go out.
Add the remaining butter and let it melt. Add the corianders, previously chopped.
Water everything with the lime juice, stir, remove from the fire and serve.

flour-balls-teleculinaria.name: Flour Balls
instructions: Remove the skin from the pharinheira and the darkener and undo it into a bowl. Add the chopped onion, the grated bread, the egg, the corianders, salt and pepper and mix everything until it's well connected.
With the anterior mass, mold balls about 2 to 4 cm in diameter and pass them by grated bread. Have them on a tray and take them to the freezer for 20 minutes.
After the time indicated, fry the balls in abundant and very hot oil. Take it off, drain it and serve it.

for-chocolate-lovers-white-chocolate-bro.name: For Chocolate Lovers: White Chocolate Brownie Recipe
for-chocolate-lovers-white-chocolate-bro.original_name: Chocolate Passions: White Chocolate Brownie Recipe
instructions: 1. Heat oven 170°C’ye(fantry oven 160°C)
2. Oil a square or sapphire an oven container and cover the base with oily paper.
3. Benmari usulu or dissolve in the cooked with bitter chocolate and butter.
4. Get a homogeneous mixture and get light-and-flavor;inside.
5. Foam Foam Foam  ü
6. Ilıdian crack add the mixture of ikolata-terey into the egg mixture, and mix it with the spatulas with gentle.
7. Add flour and salt to the mixture.
8. Mix the dough with spatula until it is homogenous.
9. Parc white cracked; add to the dough and mix to the gentle.
10. Bake 25–30 minutes in the oven that you prepare the dough.
11. 11. 11. 11. Cured test; in light humid.
12. From the oven fry at room temperature after cleaning.
13.  Dilimleyerek servis edin.
14 July You can s&uuml with sugar or veccedil;ikolata sauce.
15.  Afiyet olsun.

four-layer-pumpkin-cake-with-orange-crea.name: Four-layer Pumpkin Cake With Orange-cream Cheese Frosting
instructions: Position rack in bottom third of oven; preheat to 177°C. Spray two 9-inch cake pans with 1 1/2-inch sides with nonstick spray. Line bottoms with parchment; spray parchment.

Whisk flour and next 4 ingredients in large bowl. Using electric mixer, beat butter in another large bowl until smooth. Beat in brown sugar. Add eggs 1 at a time, beating to blend between additions. Beat in pumpkin. Add dry ingredients to butter mixture in 3 additions alternately with milk in 2 additions, beating to blend between additions. Divide batter between pans.

Bake cakes until tester inserted into center comes out clean, about 40 minutes. Cool in pans on rack 15 minutes. Run knife around cakes to loosen. Invert cakes onto racks. Remove parchment. Using tart pan bottom as aid, turn cakes over onto racks, top sides up, and cool completely. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Wrap cakes in plastic and store at room temperature.
Using electric mixer, beat butter in large bowl until smooth. Add cream cheese and orange peel; beat until smooth. Add powdered sugar and beat on low speed until smooth.

Trim rounded tops from cakes. Using long serrated knife, cut each cake horizontally in half. Place 1 cake layer, cut side up, on large platter. Spoon 2/3 cup frosting atop cake in dollops; spread to edges. Repeat 2 more times with cake and frosting; top with remaining cake layer, cut side down. Spread remaining frosting over top and sides of cake (layer will be thin). DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Cover with cake dome; chill. Let stand at room temperature 1 hour before serving.
Decorate cake with walnuts and serve.

french-toast-fingers-with-chocolate-haze.name: French Toast Fingers With Chocolate Hazelnut Spread And Blueberries
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C (175°C).
Put the cream, honey, butter, orange zest and vanilla bean in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat. Bring to a boil, stirring, and remove from the heat.
Put the eggs and sugar in a large bowl and whisk to combine.
Pour the hot cream mixture over the egg mixture and whisk to combine.

Using a bread knife, cut the crust off the brioche loaf to create a square log. Slice the loaf in half lengthways. Spread both halves with chocolate hazelnut spread, like you’re making a big sandwich, then add the blueberries to the middle and close the sandwich.
Soak the brioche loaf in the warm egg custard for 10 minutes, or until it’s well soaked.

Put coconut oil in a medium pan over medium heat and cook the brioche loaf until it’s golden brown all over, then finish in the oven for 5 minutes. Transfer to a plate lined with paper towel and slice into fingers.

fresh-lumpia-sariwa-wrappers.name: Fresh Lumpia Sariwa Wrappers

ingredients.prep: grapeseed, or other neutral oil as needed

instructions: 1. Whisk together the flour, egg, and 1 cup water until very smooth.

2. Heat an 8- or 10-inch nonstick skillet over medium heat. When a drop of water skitters across the surface before evaporating, add a little oil—just a teaspoon or so. Ladle about 2 tablespoons of the batter into the skillet and swirl it around so that it forms a thin layer on the bottom of the pan. Pour the excess batter back in the bowl.

3. When the wrapper is just cooked through and the edges lift away from the pan, remove it carefully (you need not turn it over). Repeat with the remaining batter. If you like, keep the wrappers warm, covered, in a 93°C oven, for up to an hour before filling and serving.

fried-cachucho-with-coriander-and-garlic.name: Fried Cachucho With Coriander And Garlic Stew
fried-cachucho-with-coriander-and-garlic.original_name: Cachucho frito com açorda de coentros e alho
instructions: Wash and clean the fish, season them with salt and reserve. Break bread for a bowl. Warm the milk until boiling and then lie on the bread.
Peel and finely pinch garlic teeth. Sauce them in a frying pan with some olive oil. Then add the wet bread kernel and stir well until you get the consistency of an açorda.
Retire do lume, junte os ovos batidos e os coentros picados e tempere com sal e pimenta. Leve novamente ao lume, adicione um pouco mais de azeite e misture bem. Retire do lume e reserve.

Pass the fish by flour and fry them in hot oil on both sides. Remove and drain on absorbent paper. Serve the fish with the açorda, sprinkling everything with chopped parsley and decorating with round lemon socks.

fried-cod-fillet-with-onion-teleculinari.name: Fried Cod Fillet With Onion
fried-cod-fillet-with-onion-teleculinari.original_name: Lombo de bacalhau frito com cebolada
instructions: Peel the potatoes, cut them into stick slices, wash them, put them in a bowl, season them with salt, pepper and sweet pepper and mix well. Then lay on a pot, add the white wine and 100 ml of the olive oil, cover and cook in a light for 20 minutes.

However, cut the cod loins into thick cubes. Peel the onions, garlic and carrots, cut the onion into thin half-moons, scrape the garlic and grate the carrot. Cut the pepper in half, remove its seeds and white skins and cut it into thin strips.
Light a frying pan with the rest of the olive oil and let it warm. Pass the cod cubes by flour and take them to fry on both sides, but without getting too much color. Then remove and reserve.

In the same frying pan, add the garlic, onion and laurel leaf and let it oil the onion alleys soft. Add the gratitude carot and pepper, season with salt and pepper and let it cook in a light for 5 minutes. Add the vinegar, wrap it all up and turn off the fire.
Lay the potatoes on a tray, add the cod, cover with the mixture of the onion, sprinkle with the parsley and serve.

fried-cod-with-olives-teleculinaria.name: Fried Cod With Olives

ingredients.item: 100 g green olives stuffed with almonds

instructions: Deploy cod in good time. In the day, peel and wash the onions and cloves of garlic, cut the onions into half-moon thins and pinch the garlic. Dry the cod posts with a kitchen cloth and season them with blond powder and pepper.
Peel and wash the potatoes, cut them in slices and take them to oil fries until they are golden. Remove them and let them run down on absorbent paper.

Take a frying pan to the fire with the olive oil and let it warm. Pass the cod posts by flour, add them to the frying pan and let them fry on both sides to taste. Remove the cod, add the onion and garlic to the same frying pan with the olive oil and let it cook until it is golden. Water with vinegar, gather the olives, stir and remove from the fire.
Lay the cod posts on a platter, add the fries around and cover with the mixture of onions and olives. Serve sprinkled with chopped coriander.

fried-cuttlefish-eggs-lezzet.name: Fried Cuttlefish Eggs
instructions: 1. Peel tomato and chop it in the form of cube.
2. Clean the cores of red peppers and chop it in the ring shape.
3. Clean the fresh onion and shore.
4. Peel and crush garlic.
5. Clean and examine the weed.
6. Wash and drain eggs.
7. Take the olive oil into a field and heat it.
8. Add and soak eggs, chopped fresh onion, tomato, red pepper, garlic and mulberry grass.
9. Taste the sauce and salt and get from the stove.
10. Serve hot.

fried-leeks-argiro.name: Fried Leeks
instructions: Cut the leads into something rings using only the white and Tender part.
Heat the olive oil in a pan and add the trees. Allow them to soften over low heat for about 10 minutes.
Turn up the fire and add the pork, cut into bites. Allow it to brown well for 10 minutes.
Add salt and pepper and add the Juice from a large lemon.
Cover the pan, lower the heat and simmer for about 10 minutes, until the liquids are absorbed and the food replies only with its oil.
In the end, sprinkle with coarse red pepper.
Serve with freshly cooked, warm bread and enjoy!

fried-shrimps-argiro.name: Fried Shrimps
instructions: Clean the stripes and walk them Thoroughly with kitchen paper.
In a bowl, mix all the ingredients for the baking.
Add the cleaned stripes to the bowl and mix them so that the mixture of the seasoning sticks well on them.
Make sure to dress evening with flower and other ingredients.
In a deep pan, heat some olive oil.
Once it burns well, add the shripp in doses, a few a few, and throw them for 1-2 minutes, until slightly golden.
Transfer to Absorbent paper to draw from excess oil
In a bowl, add all the olderients.
Pour in the cleaned shripp to stick the cloth on them.
Mix to dress well with flour and all the ingredients.
Add some olive oil to a deep pan.
After building the oil, add the shrimps a few minutes and fly for 1-2 minutes to brown lightly.
We put them on absorbent paper to dry.
Serve with tartar sauce or lemon mustard sauce.

fried-spare-ribs-with-asparagus-crumbs-t.name: Fried Spare Ribs With Asparagus Crumbs
fried-spare-ribs-with-asparagus-crumbs-t.original_name: Entrecosto frito com migas de espargos
instructions: Cut the ribs into small pieces and season them with the pepper paste and white wine. Let it marinate for a while.
Escorra depois o entrecosto e frite-o numa frigideira com metade do azeite. Regue com a marinada e deixe apurar.

Eliminate the toughest part of the asparagus and scorch them in boiling water seasoned with salt. Drain the asparagus well, reserve the water. Drain the bread, previously broken, in a little of the water you have reserved. Cut the asparagus into pieces, save some and wrap the rest in the bread as well as the cilantros.

In a frying pan, fry the garlic chopped in the remaining olive oil, add the bread preparation and stir with a spoon, molding the migas. If necessary, add more water from asparagus. Serve the migas decorated with the asparagus you have reserved, accompanying the ribs.

fruit-pizza-trifles-to-go.name: Fruit Pizza Trifles To Go
instructions: Combine cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla extract in a bowl until smooth. Refrigerate until cold, about 30 minutes.
Gently stir pineapple, strawberries, grapes, and blueberries together in a separate bowl.

Place ½-inch layer cream cheese mixture in bottom of each plastic cup; top with ⅓ cup mixed fruit and 1 to 2 teaspoons cookie crumbs. Garnish each trifle with sliced kiwi. Refrigerate trifles until ready to serve.

fruit-sherbet.name: Fruit Sherbet
instructions: In a large pitcher, mix together the lemon juice and sugar. Stir in the orange juice, milk, and pineapple juice. Pour into a plastic container, and freeze until stiff.
